channel.title: CWE-388 on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in CWE-388 on ZAP

item.title: A Client Error response code was returned by the server
item.description: A response code of 400 was returned by the server. This may indicate that the application is failing to handle unexpected input correctly. Raised by the ‘Alert on HTTP Response Code Error’ script

item.title: A Server Error response code was returned by the server
item.description: A response code of 500 was returned by the server. This may indicate that the application is failing to handle unexpected input correctly. Raised by the ‘Alert on HTTP Response Code Error’ script
